title: cyclone/pow~

messages.description: the base raised to the exponent

body: [cyclone/pow~] has the inlets'functionality reversed in comparison to pd vanilla's [pow~], other than that, it's quite the same! [cyclone/pow~] raises the base value (set in the right inlet) to the power of the exponent (set in the left inlet). Either inlet can receive a signal or float.[cyclone/pow~] can be useful for generating curves from [line~] as in the example below to the right.
